name: HUNTINGTON INGALLS INDUSTRIES, INC.
business: Huntington Ingalls Industries is a global defense partner that designs, builds, and maintains naval ships and provides technology solutions for defense. The company generates most of its revenue from the U.S. Government, primarily the U.S. Navy. It operates through three segments: Ingalls (non-nuclear ships), Newport News (nuclear ships), and Mission Technologies (C5ISR, AI, cybersecurity, unmanned systems, training, and nuclear support).

exposures.sentence: We are a global, all-domain defense partner, building and delivering the world's most powerful, survivable naval ships and technologies that safeguard America s seas, sky, land, space, and cyber.
Our Newport News segment includes all of our nuclear ship design, construction, overhaul, refueling, and repair and maintenance businesses.

Our Mission Technologies segment provides a wide range of services and products, including command, control, computers, communications, cyber, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance ('C5ISR') systems and operations; the application of artificial intelligence and machine learning to battlefield decisions; defense and offensive cyberspace strategies and electronic warfare; unmanned autonomous systems; live, virtual, and constructive training solutions; platform modernization; and critical nuclear operations.

Unmanned Systems Creates advanced unmanned systems for defense, marine research, and commercial applications.

catalysts.event: Conversion of 21% of total backlog into sales
catalysts.sentence: We expect approximately 21% of the $53.1 billion total backlog as of December 31, 2025, to be converted into sales during the year ending December 31, 2026.
